title: [FIREmitter] Constant probe doesn't round-trip
body:
```scala

FIRRTL version 5.1.0
circuit Top :
  public module Top : 
    output probe : Probe<UInt<8>> 
    wire w : UInt<8> 
    connect w, UInt<8>(1) 
    define probe = probe(w) 
   
```
```
./build/bin/firtool foo.fir -ir-fir | ./build/bin/circt-translate --export-firrtl | ./build/bin/firtool -format=fir
<stdin>:6:26: error: use of unknown declaration 'UInt'
    define probe = probe(UInt<8>(1)) @[<stdin> 6:7]
```
code_blocks:
FIRRTL version 5.1.0
circuit Top :

    define probe = probe(UInt<8>(1)) @[<stdin> 6:7]
